_comment: EDIT THIS FILE to add/change/remove curated events. The builder reads it on every run. 'cat' must be one of: hood, festival, art, music, soho, adventure, stage, film. 'date' is ISO YYYY-MM-DD (use the first day for multi-day). 'end' is optional ISO date for multi-day spans. 'star':true marks a standout. Live Ticketmaster concerts are added automatically on top of these.

events.title: Full Moon Jam — season opener
events.desc: Fire spinners + drum circle under the full moon. Free, ends ~10pm.

events.title: Megan Moroney — Cloud 9 Tour
events.desc: Marquee arena country. Your country-bands lane.

events.title: Chicago Blues Festival
events.desc: World's largest free blues fest. Connects to your Buddy Guy's/Rosa's backlog.

events.title: Lincoln Park Greek Fest + Ribfest (North Center)
events.desc: Two neighborhood fests same weekend: souvlaki vs. competitive BBQ.

events.title: 57th Street Art Fair (Hyde Park)
events.desc: 79th edition — the city's oldest juried art fair, with a blues stage.

events.title: Grant Park Music Festival — opening night
events.desc: Free orchestral series opens. Blanket + wine on the Great Lawn.

events.title: Wells Street Art Festival (Old Town)
events.desc: Juried art + bands in historic Old Town.

events.title: Full Moon Jam — Arrington Lagoon, Evanston
events.desc: North-suburb edition by the lagoon.

events.title: Taste of Randolph (West Loop)
events.desc: Your dining heartland — Randolph St closes for food + music. A Friday-after-work drop-in.

events.title: Summer Solstice + Art Institute: de Kooning Drawing
events.desc: Day: summer's anchor art show (abstraction). Eve: Sat Nam Solstice Celebration if running.

events.title: Chicago Pride Fest (Northalsted)
events.desc: LGBTQ+ street festival — music, vendors, drag. Precedes the Pride Parade.

events.title: Soho Live — music + dinner
events.desc: Reliable weekly at the Club Bar. Easy weeknight.

events.title: Logan Square Arts Festival
events.desc: Indie/arts-driven — the funky one. Local art, food, cocktails, eclectic music.

events.title: Full Moon Jam — Foster Beach
events.desc: Second jam of the season.

events.title: Film Under the Stars — Independence Day (30th)
events.desc: Free outdoor film series kicks off. Arrive by 6 for lawn space.

events.title: African/Caribbean Festival of Life (Union Park)
events.desc: 33rd edition; music, cuisine, traditions across the diaspora.

events.title: Full Moon Jam — Winnemac Park
events.desc: July 4 jam at an inland park — fire dancing near the fireworks.

events.title: Film Under the Stars — Ratatouille
events.desc: Taste-of-Chicago kickoff screening.

events.title: Taste of Chicago
events.desc: Back in its historic July slot. Hit a Fri eve or Sun afternoon; free entry.

events.title: Small-group keelboat sail (sunset)
events.desc: Non-trivial boat: charter a keelboat at golden hour.

events.title: Tacos y Tamales (Pilsen) + Roscoe Village Burger Fest
events.desc: Pilsen's Mexican-market-style food fest pairs with Nat'l Museum of Mexican Art.

events.title: Wicker Park Fest
events.desc: Strongest neighborhood-music identity: 50+ original acts, 200+ small businesses.

events.title: Film Under the Stars — Hamilton (America 250)
events.desc: Outdoor Hamilton screening — no ticket scramble.

events.title: Full Moon Jam — Foster Beach
events.desc: Mid-summer jam, home beach.

events.title: Lollapalooza
events.desc: Charli XCX, Lorde, The xx, Smashing Pumpkins, Jennie. Single-day tickets live.

events.title: Ravinia Festival — opening weekend
events.desc: Season to Sep 19; Paul Simon, Gladys Knight, Chance the Rapper. Lawn picnic.

events.title: Northalsted Market Days
events.desc: Largest street festival in the Midwest — huge LGBTQ+ celebration.

events.title: Monetochka — live
events.desc: Confirmed: post-Soviet indie-pop, a true Russian-artist anchor. Small room — book early.

events.title: Full Moon Jam — Rainbow Beach
events.desc: South-side edition. (Trade-off with Monetochka — your call.)

events.title: NYC weekend — flagship show + standout act
events.desc: Your 'any standout' NYC trip. Major Met/MoMA show + marquee/diaspora act.

events.title: Chicago Air & Water Show
events.desc: Watch from a rooftop or boat for the non-trivial angle.

events.title: Film Under the Stars — Sinners (finale)
events.desc: Coogler's Oscar-winning film closes the outdoor series.

events.title: Adler Planetarium — after-dark / science night
events.desc: Lakefront skyline + science. Check for adults-only evening.

events.title: Soho House — Film Club / Behind the Song
events.desc: Monthly screening+Q&A or live music. Confirm in-app.

events.title: Chicago House Music Festival + Taste of Greektown
events.desc: Free house-music fest + Greektown food fest same weekend.

events.title: Full Moon Jam — Rainbow Beach
events.desc: Late-August lakefront jam.

events.title: Chicago Jazz Festival
events.desc: Free, programmed by the Jazz Institute. Legends + rising stars.

events.title: Standup — touring headliner
events.desc: Pick a marquee comic on tour that week. Laugh Factory for a club night instead.

events.title: Soho Live + House Jazz
events.desc: Mid-week reset — live music over dinner.

events.title: Ravinia closing + neighborhood art walk
events.desc: Last call for the lawn. Pair daytime with a gallery crawl (West Town / Pilsen).

events.title: Chicago Gourmet
events.desc: One of the country's top food fests. Splurge tasting tickets.

events.title: Lyric Opera — 26/27 season opener (placeholder)
events.desc: Lyric's fall opener; titles publish over summer. Claim the date now.

events.title: Full Moon Jam — Palmisano Park (finale)
events.desc: Last jam of 2026 at the Bridgeport quarry-park. Best setting of the season.

events.title: Helicopter skyline tour (sunset)
events.desc: Non-trivial closer: lakefront + skyline by air. Book a clear-forecast evening.
